title: Vertigo neurology review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.rationale: Exact phrase located in inspected full source.

source.title: Suspected neurological conditions: recognition and referral
source.population: Adults aged over 16 years with suspected neurological conditions.
source.setting: Initial assessment and referral from primary or community care.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected adult dizziness, vertigo, limb weakness, sensory symptoms, and tremor referral features; not applicable to children and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.2.1–1.2.7 — dizziness and vertigo in adults

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports focal neurological and hearing red flags, acute vestibular syndrome, HINTS by trained clinicians, neuroimaging referral, and Hallpike assessment for positional vertigo.

assessment.text: Supports focal neurological and hearing red flags, acute vestibular syndrome, HINTS by trained clinicians, neuroimaging referral, and Hallpike assessment for positional vertigo.
assessment.rationale: Supports selected adult dizziness, positional vertigo and neurological referral features for vertigo review; no decision is generated.

assessment.text: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.
assessment.rationale: Supports entered Dubai telehealth dizziness history for vertigo review; no decision is generated.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness
source.population: People presenting with dizziness; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth dizziness documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

assessment.text: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed neurological and cardiac red flags for vertigo review; no decision is generated.
